title: BurnExecutedEvent
description: Published when a token burn transaction has been confirmed on-chain. Consumed by the GraphQL `burnExecuted` subscription (backend/src/graphql/resolvers.ts, SUBSCRIPTION_TOPICS.burnExecuted).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this event type. Bump on breaking changes.

creatorAddress.description: Owning token's creator address, used for tenant scoping (TenantScopedPayload).

amount.description: Amount burned — stringified bigint (string) or raw bigint depending on the publisher; type intentionally unconstrained since JSON Schema has no bigint primitive.
